title: callista ampla
intro: Callista ampla, also known as the butterfly orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Callista ampla include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Callista ampla can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
